en: The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God.
zh: 神的兒子 耶穌基督福音的開始。

en: As it is written in Isaiah the prophet, "Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way,
zh: 正如以賽亞先知的書上寫著： “看哪，我差遣我的使者在你面前， 預備你的道路；

en: the voice of one crying in the wilderness: Prepare the way of the Lord, make his paths straight."
zh: 在曠野有呼喊者的聲音： ‘預備主的道， 修直他的路！’”

en: John appeared, baptizing in the wilderness and proclaiming a baptism of repentance for the forgiveness of sins.
zh: 照這話，施洗的約翰在曠野出現了，傳講悔改的洗禮，使罪得赦。

en: And all the country of Judea and all Jerusalem were going out to him and were being baptized by him in the river Jordan, confessing their sins.
zh: 猶太全地和全耶路撒冷的人，都出來到他那裡去，承認自己的罪，在約旦河裡受了他的洗。

en: Now John was clothed with camel's hair and wore a leather belt around his waist and ate locusts and wild honey.
zh: 約翰身穿駱駝毛的衣服，腰束皮帶，吃的是蝗蟲和野蜜。

en: And he preached, saying, "After me comes he who is mightier than I, the strap of whose sandals I am not worthy to stoop down and untie.
zh: 他傳講說：“有一位在我以後來的，能力比我大，我就是彎腰給他解鞋帶都沒有資格。

en: I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
zh: 我用水給你們施洗，他卻要用聖靈給你們施洗。”

en: In those days Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee and was baptized by John in the Jordan.
zh: 那時候耶穌從加利利的拿撒勒來，在約旦河裡受了約翰的洗。

en: And when he came up out of the water, immediately he saw the heavens opening and the Spirit descending on him like a dove.
zh: 他從水裡一上來，就看見天裂開了，聖靈仿佛鴿子降在他身上。

en: And a voice came from heaven, "You are my beloved Son; with you I am well pleased."
zh: 又有聲音從天上來說：“你是我的愛子，我喜悅你。”

en: The Spirit immediately drove him out into the wilderness.
zh: 聖靈隨即催促耶穌到曠野去。

en: And he was in the wilderness forty days, being tempted by Satan. And he was with the wild animals, and the angels were ministering to him.
zh: 他在那裡四十天，受撒但的試探，和野獸在一起，有天使來服事他。

en: Now after John was arrested, Jesus came into Galilee, proclaiming the gospel of God,
zh: 約翰被捕以後，耶穌來到加利利，宣講 神的福音，

en: and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God is at hand; repent and believe in the gospel."
zh: 說：“時候到了， 神的國近了，你們應當悔改，相信福音。”

en: Passing alongside the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and Andrew the brother of Simon casting a net into the sea, for they were fishermen.
zh: 耶穌沿著加利利海邊行走，看見西門和他弟弟安得烈在海上撒網；他們是漁夫。

en: And Jesus said to them, "Follow me, and I will make you become fishers of men."
zh: 耶穌就對他們說：“來跟從我，我要使你們成為得人的漁夫。”

en: And immediately they left their nets and followed him.
zh: 他們立刻撇下網，跟從了他。

en: And going on a little farther, he saw James the son of Zebedee and John his brother, who were in their boat mending the nets.
zh: 耶穌稍往前走，看見西庇太的兒子雅各，和雅各的弟弟約翰，正在船上整理魚網，

en: And immediately he called them, and they left their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired servants and followed him.
zh: 他立即呼召他們。他們撇下父親西庇太和雇工在船上，就跟從他去了。

en: And they went into Capernaum, and immediately on the Sabbath he entered the synagogue and was teaching.
zh: 他們到了迦百農，耶穌隨即在安息日進入會堂教導人。

en: And they were astonished at his teaching, for he taught them as one who had authority, and not as the scribes.
zh: 大家對他的教訓都很驚奇，因為他教導他們，像一個有權柄的人，不像經學家。

en: And immediately there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit. And he cried out,
zh: 就在那時，會堂裡有一個被污靈附著的人，喊叫起來，

en: "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are- the Holy One of God."
zh: 說：“拿撒勒人耶穌，我們跟你有甚麼關係呢？你來毀滅我們嗎？我知道你是誰，你是 神的聖者。”

en: But Jesus rebuked him, saying, "Be silent, and come out of him!"
zh: 耶穌斥責他說：“住口！從他身上出來！”

en: And the unclean spirit, convulsing him and crying out with a loud voice, came out of him.
zh: 污靈使那人抽瘋，大聲喊叫，就從他身上出來了。

en: And they were all amazed, so that they questioned among themselves, saying, "What is this? A new teaching with authority! He commands even the unclean spirits, and they obey him."
zh: 眾人都很驚訝，於是彼此對問說：“這是怎麼一回事？是個有權能的新道理啊！他吩咐污靈，污靈竟服從了他！”

en: And at once his fame spread everywhere throughout all the surrounding region of Galilee.
zh: 耶穌的名聲立刻傳遍了加利利一帶。

en: And immediately he left the synagogue and entered the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John.
zh: 他們一出會堂，就和雅各、約翰到西門和安得烈的家裡去。

en: Now Simon's mother-in-law lay ill with a fever, and immediately they told him about her.
zh: 西門的岳母正在發燒躺著，他們立刻告訴耶穌。

en: And he came and took her by the hand and lifted her up, and the fever left her, and she began to serve them.
zh: 耶穌走到她面前，拉著她的手，扶她起來，熱就退了，她就服事他們。

en: That evening at sundown they brought to him all who were sick or oppressed by demons.
zh: 到了黃昏，有人不斷把生病的和被鬼附的，都帶到耶穌面前。

en: And the whole city was gathered together at the door.
zh: 全城的人都聚集在門口。

en: And he healed many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons. And he would not permit the demons to speak, because they knew him.
zh: 耶穌醫好了各樣的病，也趕出許多的鬼，並且不許鬼說話，因為鬼認識他。

en: And rising very early in the morning, while it was still dark, he departed and went out to a desolate place, and there he prayed.
zh: 次日凌晨，天還沒有亮，耶穌起身出去，來到荒野的地方，在那裡禱告。

en: And Simon and those who were with him searched for him,
zh: 西門和那些跟他在一起的人就去尋找耶穌。

en: and they found him and said to him, "Everyone is looking for you."
zh: 他們找到了，就對他說：“大家都在找你呢！”

en: And he said to them, "Let us go on to the next towns, that I may preach there also, for that is why I came out."
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我們到鄰近的鄉鎮去吧，我也好在那裡傳道，因為我就是為這事而來的。”

en: And he went throughout all Galilee, preaching in their synagogues and casting out demons.
zh: 於是他走遍加利利全地，在他們的會堂裡傳道，並且趕鬼。

en: And a leper came to him, imploring him, and kneeling said to him, "If you will, you can make me clean."
zh: 有一個患痲風的人，來到耶穌跟前，跪下求他說：“如果你肯，必能使我潔淨。”

en: Moved with pity, he stretched out his hand and touched him and said to him, "I will; be clean."
zh: 耶穌動了憐憫的心，就伸手摸他，說：“我肯，你潔淨了吧！”

en: And immediately the leprosy left him, and he was made clean.
zh: 痲風立刻離開了他，他就潔淨了。

en: And Jesus sternly charged him and sent him away at once,
zh: 耶穌打發那人離開以前，嚴厲地吩咐他，

en: and said to him, "See that you say nothing to anyone, but go, show yourself to the priest and offer for your cleansing what Moses commanded, for a proof to them."
zh: 說：“你千萬不可把這事告訴任何人，你只要去給祭司檢查，並且照著摩西所規定的，為你得潔淨獻祭，好向大家作證。”

en: But he went out and began to talk freely about it, and to spread the news, so that Jesus could no longer openly enter a town, but was out in desolate places, and people were coming to him from every quarter.
zh: 但那人出來，竟任意傳講，就把這事傳開了，以致耶穌不能再公開進城，只好留在外邊荒野的地方；然而還是有人從各處到他那裡去。
